For me the best thing about fangames is how fast you can restart. I’m pretty new to fangames (ca. 20 hours currently) and mostly played Celeste before and the 1 second death animation already gets really annoing if you die 10000 times.

Played through hollow knight and super meat boy last year for the first time as well and the worst thing is if you want to kill yourself in game because you messed something up but there is no restart key so you just have to run into an enemy which could be far away.
